question_summary: Reproduce the intermittent 503 from the rate limiter under burst load.
response_core: Traced to an LRU eviction race when two requests hit the same key within a single tick — token-bucket state lost mid-refill.

question_summary: Pick between a per-key lock or a CAS-style atomic refill for the fix.
response_core: Chose per-key lock — refill is microsecond-scale and lock contention is bounded by tier count, so the simpler shape wins over CAS retry loops.

question_summary: Add a regression test that catches the original race.
response_core: Added test_burst.py — 200 concurrent requests against one key, asserts no 503s and exactly N tokens consumed. Reproduces the bug on main, passes on the fix.
